message:
test(storage): add SQLite ID caching benchmarks (1tmi)

Benchmark results:
- 16-24x speedup (cached vs direct DB calls)
- 99% agent hit rate (target >90%)
- 94% workspace hit rate (target >80%)
- ~50KB memory overhead for 1100 cached entries

Tests verify success criteria from Opt 7.4 task.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
